result.name: Penultimate key
result.description: Level: 1d6 + 2 Effect: Locks or unlocks any one door, portal, chest, or other lockable item of the cypher’s level or lower. The targeted item must have a keyhole for the cypher to work. Legends speak of the Ultimate Key, which can open any lock, even those sealed by a god.

sections.name: Penultimate key
sections.effect:
Level: 1d6 + 2

Effect: Locks or unlocks any one door, portal, chest, or other lockable item of the cypher’s level or lower. The targeted item must have a keyhole for the cypher to work.

Legends speak of the Ultimate Key, which can open any lock, even those sealed by a god.
